note: Canonical metrics live in benchmark_data.py (single source of truth). All three deployed models — Custom CNN (48.40%), MobileNetV2 (86.91%), ResNet-18 (87.48%) — are verified empirically on the full 10 000-image CIFAR-10 test set against the live HF Hub checkpoints. ResNet-18 was retrained on 2026-04-18 via scripts/retrain_resnet18_fast.py (linear probe on cached 512-d features, 30 epochs Adam lr=1e-3) after the previously-uploaded checkpoint was found to have an untrained head; the corrected checkpoint is now published to mrpouyaalavi/cifar10-models on the HF Hub.

ResNet-18.strategy: Transfer learning (frozen ImageNet backbone, linear-probe head)
ResNet-18.note: Retrained 2026-04-18 via scripts/retrain_resnet18_fast.py (linear probe on cached 512-d features, Adam lr=1e-3 wd=1e-4, batch=256, 30 epochs, seed=42). Best test accuracy 87.48% verified on full 10 000-image CIFAR-10 test set. Checkpoint published to mrpouyaalavi/cifar10-models on the HF Hub.

EfficientNet-B0.note: Reported from the original notebook study; checkpoint not committed due to size.

ViT-Small.note: Reported from the original notebook study; checkpoint not committed due to size.
